blended.narrative: Stoneham is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 16 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
